# UC-14.10.3 · Aranet Humidity Out of Range for Server Room RH Band

## Description

ASHRAE-style guidance for data halls often targets 40–60% RH to balance static and condensation risk.

## Value

Protects hardware from corrosion and static discharge in edge closets.

## Implementation

(1) Tag sensor locations. (2) Adjust RH band to site policy. (3) Correlate with cooling valves.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval rh=tonumber(coalesce(humidity_pct, rh_pct, ""))
| eval loc=coalesce(location, zone, "")
| where (rh<40 OR rh>60) AND match(lower(loc), "(?i)server|idc|mdf|network")
| stats sparkline(avg(rh),1h) as rh_trend latest(rh) as humidity_pct by sensor_id loc
```

## Visualization

Gauge vs band; trend sparkline.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
